Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Naraka Traveler]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — A Naraka Traveler can have a glowing red rune on their hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 20''' — Naraka Travelers eat a fruit to protect them from heat during training.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 1''' — The Naraka Traveler had empty blue eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Grandmaster Naraka's granddaughter was a Naraka Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Naraka Travelers call burning insects out of thin air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Simon murdered several Naraka Travelers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 11''' — Naraka Travelers have a specific symbol tattooed on their hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 13''' — Naraka Travelers are a group that tends to be judgmental.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — Naraka Travelers guard Grandmaster Naraka's door.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 16''' — A robed Naraka Traveler is present in the room and can make serpents evaporate with a red-marked hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 17''' — There is a roped-off section for Naraka Travelers to enter and exit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 19''' — Naraka Travelers are people who can remain cool and dry in heat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Naraka Travelers are accustomed to mere pain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — A Naraka Traveler can take someone to Myria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — Alin is a Naraka Traveler.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — Naraka Travelers hold the Naraka Gate open.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Cynara would have made a wonderful Naraka Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — Naraka Travelers wear red robes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — A Naraka Traveler is a guard at the tent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — Leah orders the Naraka Travelers to open a Gate.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
